name: epf-engine
description: Knowledge graph schema for the EPF (Emergent Product Framework) strategy engine — tracks artifacts, value models, features, personas, OKRs, agents, and skills.
author: emergent-company

objectTypes.name: Artifact
objectTypes.label: Artifact
objectTypes.description: An EPF YAML artifact such as a north star, strategy formula, insight analysis, or roadmap recipe. Lives in the READY/FIRE/AIM phased structure.
objectTypes.extraction_guidelines: Extract when a document references a specific EPF file or artifact type (north_star, strategy_formula, insight_analyses, roadmap_recipe, value_model, etc.). Capture the artifact type, phase, and purpose.

description.description: What this artifact defines or contains

artifact_type.description: EPF artifact type: north_star, strategy_formula, insight_analyses, roadmap_recipe, feature_definition, value_model, assessment_report, etc.

phase.description: EPF phase: READY, FIRE, or AIM

file_path.description: Relative path within the EPF instance

objectTypes.name: ValueModelComponent
objectTypes.label: Value Model Component
objectTypes.description: A component in the EPF value model hierarchy. Value models have 3 levels: L1 (track/layer), L2 (component), L3 (sub-component). Paths follow the format Track.L1.L2 or Track.L1.L2.L3.
objectTypes.extraction_guidelines: Extract when a document references value model paths like Product.Core.GraphEngine or Strategy.Growth.MarketExpansion. Capture the full dotted path, the level, and the track.

track.description: Track: Product, Strategy, OrgOps, or Commercial

level.description: Hierarchy level: L1, L2, or L3

maturity.description: Maturity level: hypothetical, emerging, proven, or scaled

objectTypes.name: Persona
objectTypes.label: Persona
objectTypes.description: A target user persona defined in the EPF strategy. Personas represent the people the product is built for, with goals, pain points, and usage context.
objectTypes.extraction_guidelines: Extract when a document describes a target user, their role, goals, pain points, or usage patterns. Look for persona IDs (e.g. persona-001) or named user archetypes.

name.description: Persona name or archetype (e.g. Solo Developer, Product Manager)

description.description: Who this persona is and what they care about

objectTypes.name: Feature
objectTypes.label: Feature
objectTypes.description: A product feature defined as an EPF feature definition. Features have capabilities, maturity levels, and contribute to value model components.
objectTypes.extraction_guidelines: Extract when a document references a feature definition (fd-xxx), a named product capability, or describes functionality being built. Capture the feature ID, status, and what value model paths it contributes to.

name.description: Feature name (e.g. Knowledge Exploration, CLI Local Development)

description.description: What this feature does and why it matters

status.description: Feature status: draft, active, delivered, deprecated

contributes_to.description: Comma-separated value model paths this feature contributes to

objectTypes.name: OKR
objectTypes.label: OKR
objectTypes.description: An Objective and Key Result from the EPF roadmap. OKRs define measurable goals organized by track and cycle.
objectTypes.extraction_guidelines: Extract when a document references objectives, key results, OKR IDs (e.g. kr-p-2025-q1-001), targets, or measurable outcomes tied to the roadmap.

description.description: What this OKR aims to achieve

track.description: Track: product, strategy, org_ops, or commercial

status.description: Status: not_started, in_progress, met, exceeded, missed

objectTypes.name: Agent
objectTypes.label: Agent
objectTypes.description: An AI agent persona that orchestrates EPF workflows. Agents have identity, personality, required skills, and routing rules.
objectTypes.extraction_guidelines: Extract when a document describes an AI agent, its role, personality, required skills, or the tasks it handles. Look for agent names like pathfinder, product_architect, onboarding-guide.

description.description: What this agent does and when to use it

agent_type.description: Agent type: guide, strategist, specialist, architect, reviewer

phase.description: EPF phase this agent operates in: READY, FIRE, AIM, Onboarding

objectTypes.name: Skill
objectTypes.label: Skill
objectTypes.description: A bundled capability with prompts, prerequisites, and validation. Skills unify the previous wizard and generator concepts. Types include creation, generation, review, enrichment, and analysis.
objectTypes.extraction_guidelines: Extract when a document references a skill, wizard, or generator by name. Look for skill types (creation, generation, review) and their required artifacts or prerequisites.

description.description: What this skill produces or evaluates

skill_type.description: Skill type: creation, generation, review, enrichment, analysis

category.description: Category: compliance, marketing, investor, internal, development, custom

relationshipTypes.name: contributes_to
relationshipTypes.label: Contributes To
relationshipTypes.description: A feature contributes value to a value model component

relationshipTypes.name: targets
relationshipTypes.label: Targets
relationshipTypes.description: An OKR targets advancement of a value model component

relationshipTypes.name: serves
relationshipTypes.label: Serves
relationshipTypes.description: A feature is designed to serve a specific persona

relationshipTypes.name: uses_skill
relationshipTypes.label: Uses Skill
relationshipTypes.description: An agent requires or optionally uses a skill

relationshipTypes.name: depends_on
relationshipTypes.label: Depends On
relationshipTypes.description: A feature depends on another feature

relationshipTypes.name: references
relationshipTypes.label: References
relationshipTypes.description: An artifact references or defines a feature, persona, or OKR

relationshipTypes.name: belongs_to_phase
relationshipTypes.label: Belongs To Phase
relationshipTypes.description: An artifact or entity belongs to an EPF phase (READY, FIRE, or AIM)

relationshipTypes.name: delivers
relationshipTypes.label: Delivers
relationshipTypes.description: An OKR delivers or advances a feature
